prestazioni: M840T 4.0L twin-turbo V8 engine: Full carbon-fiber Garrett GT35R turbocharger upgrade (1.2 bar boost, billet compressor wheel, 64mm inducer) paired with a bespoke McLaren Special Operations (MSO) titanium exhaust system featuring 3.5-inch downpipes and a secondary bypass valve for aggressive backpressure control at 6,500 RPM

Litchfield Motorsport M840T-specific ECU recalibration (Stage 3+) with custom ignition timing maps (12.5:1 AFR at peak load, 22° BTDC timing advance) and a Motec PDM15 power distribution module for precise fuel pump and injector control (ID1050x injectors, Walbro 450 LPH dual-pump setup)

KW Suspensions Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilovers with McLaren-specific spring rates (1,200 lbs/in front, 1,400 lbs/in rear), spherical bearing top mounts, and a custom anti-roll bar setup (24mm front, 22mm rear) developed in collaboration with GPR Racing for Nürburgring lap optimization
estetica: Vorsteiner M7 Carbon Aero Package (Spider-specific) including a full carbon-fiber front splitter with integrated canards, side skirts with vortex generators, and a rear diffuser with active Gurney flap (electrically adjustable via McLaren’s IRIS infotainment system)

Novitec McLaren 720S Spider widebody conversion kit (25mm front, 30mm rear fender flares) paired with custom 21x10.5 ET45 (front) and 22x12.5 ET50 (rear) forged aluminum wheels by HRE (FF03 model, 3-piece construction, titanium bolts) wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (265/30 R21 front, 325/25 R22 rear)

MSO Heritage Edition paint scheme (custom 'Volcano Red' with satin black carbon-fiber weave accents) applied via a 12-stage process, including a matte clear coat with UV-resistant additives and hand-polished gold leaf pinstriping on the A-pillars and rear wing supports
